hooks.command: sh -c 'd="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ -n "$d" ]; do if [ -f "$d/.codex/hooks/dreaming.py" ]; then exec python3 "$d/.codex/hooks/dreaming.py" session-start; fi; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; printf %s "{\"continue\":true,\"systemMessage\":\"learning-agent hook script not found; continue normally\"}"'
hooks.statusMessage: Loading learning memory and homework reminders

hooks.command: sh -c 'd="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ -n "$d" ]; do if [ -f "$d/.codex/hooks/dreaming.py" ]; then exec python3 "$d/.codex/hooks/dreaming.py" stop; fi; d=$(dirname "$d"); done; printf %s "{\"continue\":true,\"systemMessage\":\"learning-agent hook script not found; continue normally\"}"'
